svg.title: Eduardo Teodoro
svg.desc: I build products and intelligent systems that help businesses understand themselves, make better decisions and evolve continuously.

text.font-family: Arial Narrow, Liberation Sans Narrow, Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: For me, technology makes sense when it brings clarity to complexity.

text.font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: I build systems and products that solve real problems and create opportunities.

text.font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: I believe in automation with purpose, data with intelligence and code with impact.

text.font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: My goal is simple: empower people and businesses to grow and make a difference.

g.text: From business to technology. From knowledge to impact.
